primary.title: Currency Converter - Live Exchange Rate Calculator
primary.description: Convert money values between major global currencies (USD, EUR, INR, GBP, JPY, CAD, AUD) with real-time conversion rates.
primary.heading: Currency Converter
primary.seo_content:
Our Currency Converter converts values between major currencies. Here is how conversions are computed:

  • 1. Convert between currencies

    Formula: USD Value = Amount / Rate[From] | Result = USD Value × Rate[To]
    Example: Converting 100 USD to INR at an exchange rate of 83.50 yields ₹8,350.00.

  • 2. Live Exchange Rate updates

    Fetches live rates from open.er-api.com and caches them in your browser for offline travel use.

examples.title: Convert 100 USD to INR
examples.description: Converting $100 USD at an exchange rate of 83.50 INR yields ₹8,350.00 Indian Rupees.

examples.title: Convert EUR to GBP for travel shopping
examples.description: Converting €250 Euros at a rate of 0.85 GBP yields £212.50 British Pounds.

faqs.question: Where do the exchange rates come from?
faqs.answer: This calculator utilizes basic updated standard market reference rates. You can also manually customize or view live estimates directly on screen.

faqs.question: Is this converter safe to use offline?
faqs.answer: Yes. If an internet connection is unavailable, the converter falls back to local preloaded rates, ensuring you can still perform calculations while traveling.

live-currency-rates.title: Live Currency Rates - Check Forex Exchange Values
live-currency-rates.description: Check current foreign exchange rates for USD, INR, EUR, GBP, and JPY. Free online currency rate tracker.
live-currency-rates.heading: Live Currency Rates
live-currency-rates.seo_content:
Check current foreign exchange rates for major currencies. Here is an example of checking rates:

  • Forex Rate Tracking

    Example: Checking how many Euros (EUR) or Indian Rupees (INR) you get for exactly 1 US Dollar (USD).

examples.title: Forex rate comparisons
examples.description: Reviewing rates to find the relative strength of the Euro against the USD.

faqs.question: How often do rates update?
faqs.answer: Rates are updated periodically. For critical transactions, verify rates with your banking provider.

exchange-rate-calculator.title: Exchange Rate Calculator - Convert Forex Currency Online
exchange-rate-calculator.description: Calculate conversion factors and cross rates for international transactions. Free forex calculator.
exchange-rate-calculator.heading: Exchange Rate Calculator
exchange-rate-calculator.seo_content:
Calculate conversion factors and cross rates for international transactions. Here is a calculation scenario:

  • Import Purchase calculation

    Example: Buying a £120 GBP item calculates to approximately $150.00 USD at a cross rate of 1.25.

examples.title: Import purchase estimation
examples.description: Buying a £120 GBP item calculates to approximately $150 USD.

faqs.question: Are transaction fees included?
faqs.answer: No. Most banks and credit cards charge a 1% to 3% foreign transaction fee, which you should account for on top of these mid-market rates.
